svg.title: Token Usage Dashboard Mobile — telemetry
svg.desc: Mobile token usage telemetry: 52.4B tokens, 93.1% cache hit, $52,207.19 estimated cost, peak 5.8B on 06-06. Pure SVG SMIL animation.
